inline_comments.message:
First of all, I don't understand why we need all those awful editors when everyone could just use emacs (or vim in they are French in worse case):D

Secondly I don't understand why we need to collect all those entries in our git ignore while git allows you to set a system-wide git ignore and put there all that your favorite editor creates:

https://gist.github.com/sanemat/944064

Lastly if we really need this because we want to win a competition for the longest .gitignore file in whole onap why don;t we use the gitignore that is recommended by github;)

https://github.com/github/gitignore/blob/master/Global/VisualStudioCode.gitignore

A person using emacs cannot understand the beauty, that's for sure :P

--> I didn't knew the system wide gitignore, awesome!
